title: The Sharing Berry
description: A little sparrow finds a giant berry and learns that sharing makes everything sweeter. A ready-to-run example showing characters, dialogue voices, motion, overlays and negative prompts.
style_prefix: bright and colorful storybook illustration, whimsical style, soft warm light

characters.name: pip
characters.description: a small brown sparrow with a white belly and an orange beak

characters.name: benny
characters.description: a tan rabbit with long pink-tipped ears and a fluffy white tail

scenes.narration: In a sunny forest, Pip the sparrow found the biggest berry he had ever seen!
scenes.image_prompt: wide establishing shot, {pip} hopping excitedly around a giant shiny red berry in a sunlit forest clearing, golden morning light, cheerful mood
scenes.motion: {pip} hops around the berry, wings fluttering with excitement

scenes.narration: Pip, can we share it? I'm so hungry!
scenes.image_prompt: medium shot, {benny} looking up hopefully at {pip} perched on the giant red berry, big pleading eyes, soft forest light filtering through leaves
scenes.motion: {benny} is talking, mouth moving as he speaks, ears drooping hopefully

scenes.narration: Of course! Berries taste sweeter when we share them with friends.
scenes.image_prompt: low-angle medium shot, {pip} and {benny} happily eating the giant red berry together, juice sparkling, warm golden-hour glow, joyful atmosphere
scenes.motion: {pip} is talking cheerfully, then both characters eat the berry together, laughing
